name: fornix-studio-mcp
description: MCP server for Fornix – project workspace tools with optional experimental Studio One bridge

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test tests/bridge/bridge-handshake.test.js tests/bridge/bridge-cleanup.test.js tests/extension/router.test.js tests/production/production-package.test.js
scripts.test:bridge: npm run build && node --test tests/bridge/bridge-handshake.test.js tests/bridge/bridge-cleanup.test.js
